title: Dynamidium syeniteum
taxonomy: Dynamidium syeniteum is a species of moss in the family Pottiaceae. It belongs to the class Bryopsida, which is a group of mosses that have peristome teeth on the spores. As a member of the family Pottiaceae, it is also classified under the order Pottiales. The class Bryopsida is further grouped into the division Bryophyta, which consists of all mosses. This classification provides an overview of the complex relationships within the plant kingdom.
